methods.remarks: Get and mark the current input point

params.doc: Starting point End point input is possible by a distance input to the start point

methods.remarks: Get and mark the current input point

params.name: bStartPnt
params.doc: Starting point is active End point input is possible by a distance input to the start point

methods.name: GetCurrentPoint(bStartPnt)

methods.remarks: Get and mark the current input point End point input is possible by a distance input to the input point of the last input step

params.name: End
params.doc: point input is possible by a distance input to the input point of the last input step

methods.name: InitFirstElementInput
methods.summary: Initialize the coordinate input for an element (point, line, ...) input as free point input. The coordinate input toolbar shows only the request string. The input is allowed in each document.
methods.remarks: Initialize the coordinate input for an element (point, line, ...) input as free point input. The coordinate input toolbar shows only the request string. The input is allowed in each document.

params.name: text
params.doc: Request string as resource ID, CAllstring, TCHAR or CString

methods.name: InitFirstElementValueInput
methods.summary: Initialize the coordinate input for an element (point, line, ...) input as free point input. The coordinate input toolbar shows only the request string and the value input controls. The input is allowed only in the document from the last input
methods.remarks: Initialize the coordinate input for an element (point, line, ...) input as free point input. The coordinate input toolbar shows only the request string and the value input controls. The input is allowed only in the document from the last input

params.name: text
params.doc: Request string as resource ID, CAllstring, TCHAR or CString

params.name: ctrlData
params.doc: Input control data as eValueInputControlType or ValueInputControlData object

methods.name: InitFirstPointInput
methods.summary: Initialize the coordinate input for a first point input. The input is allowed in each document Sample: InitFirstPointInput(IDC_FIRST_POINT); InitFirstPointInput(CAllString(32128));
methods.remarks: Initialize the coordinate input for a first point input. The input is allowed in each document Sample: InitFirstPointInput(IDC_FIRST_POINT); InitFirstPointInput(CAllString(32128));

params.name: text
params.doc: Request string as resource ID, CAllstring, TCHAR or CString

methods.name: InitFirstPointValueInput
methods.summary: Initialize the coordinate input for a first point and value input. The input is allowed in each document Sample: InitFirstPointValueInput(IDC_FIRST_POINT,ValueInputControlData::COORDINATE_EDIT); InitFirstPointValueInput(CAllString(32128),ValueInputControlData(ValueInputControlData::DOUBLE_EDIT,20.,0.,1000.));
methods.remarks: Initialize the coordinate input for a first point and value input. The input is allowed in each document Sample: InitFirstPointValueInput(IDC_FIRST_POINT,ValueInputControlData::COORDINATE_EDIT); InitFirstPointValueInput(CAllString(32128),ValueInputControlData(ValueInputControlData::DOUBLE_EDIT,20.,0.,1000.));

params.name: text

params.doc: Input control data as eValueInputControlType or ValueInputControlData object
